description: Avalanche (AVAX) emerged in 2020 as Avalanche’s native token powering DeFi, NFTs, and real-world assets (RWA) through its subnet architecture. NOW on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — ATC-20 AVAX gives original AVAX holders and traders instant finality, fixed ultra-low gas fee, and AI contract capability, turning it into a much faster, more secure and scalable asset in the Atlantis Kingdom.
name: Avalanche
